bead.title: bench-pr-A3a: concurrency-group flock + --jobs pool + in-flight.json
bead.description:
PROBLEM: The A2 bash runner has no host-level serialization for exclusive runtimes; concurrent sweeps race on GPUs/runtimes. No bounded job pool exists. No visibility into running cells from outside the process.

ROOT CAUSE:
  - scripts/benchmark/benchmark (A2): per-cell loop runs cells inline with no flock guard, no job-control pool, no shared state file.
  - No state directory convention exists for the bash runner.

PROPOSED FIX:
  1. State dir: $FIZEAU_BENCH_STATE_DIR (default ${XDG_CACHE_HOME:-$HOME/.cache}/fizeau-benchmark). Subdir locks/, plus <hostname>/in-flight.json.
  2. Per cell: `flock $FIZEAU_BENCH_STATE_DIR/locks/<concurrency-group>.lock` around cell exec; group resolved from profile/bench-set.
  3. --jobs N flag (default 1): bash job-control pool with `wait -n`; bounded by N.
  4. in-flight.json: under a separate flock, append {cell_id,pid,started_at} at cell start, remove at close. On read, prune dead-PID entries.
  5. Hostname segregation so multi-host shared NFS state-dirs do not collide.

NON-SCOPE (preserved from parent):
  - cell-report.schema.json (PR B); bench-set schema (PR C)
  - Node collector/importers (PR D/E); deleting cmd/bench (PR F); docs (PR G)
  - Harbor image, shell adapters, agent-leak fix (A1)
  - Bash runner core, --plan, report.json composition (A2)
  - Parity fixtures + diff.sh (A4)
  - Signal handling and docker cleanup (A3b)
  - Cost cap / budget.json (A3c)
  - cmd/bench redirect (A3d)

GOVERNING: plan-2026-05-15-benchmark-runner-simplification. Depends on A2 (runner skeleton).

ACCEPTANCE:
  1. test_runner_concurrency.sh::test_concurrency_group_flock_serializes — two `./benchmark --profile sindri-lucebox …` invocations sharing a concurrency-group lock; second waits until first releases. Verify by timestamp ordering in cell reports.
  2. test_runner_concurrency.sh::test_in_flight_json_tracks_cells — during a sweep, $FIZEAU_BENCH_STATE_DIR/<hostname>/in-flight.json lists each running cell; entries removed at close; stale-PID entries pruned on next read.
  3. test_runner_concurrency.sh::test_jobs_pool_bounded — `./benchmark --jobs 2` runs at most 2 cells concurrently (verified by in-flight.json max length over sampled reads).

GATES: `go test ./...` green; `lefthook run pre-commit` green; `bash scripts/benchmark/test/run.sh`.
bead.acceptance: All 3 ACs pass; satisfies parent AC4, AC5; go test + lefthook gates green.
